_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Cookie Notice
_meta.description: This CookieNotice component is a user-friendly notification banner built with Shadcn UI and Tailwind CSS, designed to comply with cookie consent requirements. Positioned at the bottom center of the screen, it appears as a dismissible card containing a cookie icon, title, descriptive text, and links to policy details and preference management. The notice gives users a clear choice to review cookie policies, adjust their preferences, or simply click Accept to dismiss it.
